perturbation.original_text: Each party to the agreement expressly authorizes each other party to file on its behalf any and all amendments to such statement.
perturbation.changed_text: Each party to the agreement may authorize another party regarding amendments to the statement.
perturbation.explanation: Changing 'expressly authorizes' to 'may authorize' introduces a contradiction. The original text clearly defines the authority of each party regarding amendments to the joint statement, explicitly stating that each party authorizes other parties to file amendments on their behalf. This sets a mandatory obligation. The changed text introduces uncertainty by changing 'expressly authorizes' to 'may authorize'. The word 'may' implies permission, not obligation, this affects the enforceability of joint action with regards to the amendments.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Each party to the agreement may authorize another party regarding amendments to the statement.
perturbation.justification: The original text states that each party 'expressly authorizes' the other parties to file amendments, creating a mandatory obligation. The changed text alters this to 'may authorize', which introduces permission rather than obligation. This weakens the enforceability of joint action regarding amendments, directly conflicting with the contradicted text, which is actually the same as the changed text, creating in-text contradiction. Because the original text and changed text are different, but the changed text and contradicted text are the same, the change from mandatory authorization to permitted authorization constitutes an in-text contradiction according to the definition of Omissions - In Text Contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: In evidence whereof, the undersigned have caused this Agreement to be executed on their behalf this 7t h day of April, 2020.
perturbation.changed_text: In evidence whereof, the undersigned agree on the purpose of this document this 7t h day of April, 2020.
perturbation.explanation: The phrase 'have caused this Agreement to be executed on their behalf' is strong evidence of formal execution and agreement to the document's terms. Replacing it with 'agree on the purpose of this document' weakens the commitment significantly. It suggests agreement on the general intent of the document, but not necessarily a legally binding commitment to all its terms, especially considering the prior removal of the clause requiring the agreement itself to be filed.
perturbation.contradicted_text: In evidence whereof, the undersigned agree on the purpose of this document this 7t h day of April, 2020.
perturbation.justification: The original text clearly indicates a formal agreement execution. The changed text replaces this with a weaker statement of agreement on the purpose, which contradicts the continued expectation of a legally binding executed agreement as suggested in the 'Contradicted Text'. The modified text weakens the commitment significantly, creating a strong inconsistency.
